summary: Iteration 72: Full audit test - ALL features verified and working. Fixed employee login (wrong API endpoint) and seeded admin password hash.
critical_code_review_comments: Employee portal uses SHA-256 for password hashing (not bcrypt) - consider migrating to bcrypt for better security
seed_data_creation: Updated admin@manoprotect.com with SHA-256 password hash for Admin2026!
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: 1) Alarm checkout with Stripe (alarm-essential/premium/business) returns real checkout URLs, 2) Newsletter API (subscribe/stats) working, 3) Employee login fixed and working with admin@manoprotect.com / Admin2026!, 4) Header nav shows Alarmas and Escudo Vecinal links, 5) /escudo-vecinal shows map with 14 active incidents, 6) Footer newsletter form works. Employee password is hashed with SHA-256 (not bcrypt).

alarm_checkout.alarm-essential: PASS - returns Stripe checkout URL (24.99 EUR/mes)
alarm_checkout.alarm-premium: PASS - returns Stripe checkout URL (39.99 EUR/mes)
alarm_checkout.alarm-business: PASS - returns Stripe checkout URL (54.99 EUR/mes)

pages./alarmas-hogar: PASS - pricing cards with Contratar ahora buttons

footer.newsletter_form: PASS - email input and subscribe button working

fixes_applied.issue: Wrong API endpoint for employee login

mocked_apis_note: SMS (Infobip), SendGrid, Twilio WhatsApp are MOCKED/sandbox. All other APIs including Stripe checkout are real.
